description: This map displays a high-resolution aerial or satellite image of a peri-urban landscape with a scale bar of 200 m and a North arrow pointing upwards. The image shows a diverse mix of land cover types. In the central and upper-right areas, there is a dense residential settlement characterised by numerous individual houses with varying roof colours, interconnected by a network of grey roads. To the upper left, a sports complex is visible, featuring a green football field and red/orange tennis courts, surrounded by impervious surfaces and some buildings. Further left, a cluster of larger buildings with grey/white roofs and extensive associated parking areas suggests commercial or industrial land use. Large areas of dark green dense forest cover the upper left, bottom left, and right sides of the image, bordering the developed areas. In the bottom-left quadrant, a significant patch of light brown/tan bare soil or recently cleared land with visible linear patterns is present, adjacent to the forest.
